race.description: Racing WA Provincial Championship Series Ht Hcp
race.comment: FLYING SOUTH (2) won three back and has been in good order since, running in a strong race here last start behind an impressive winner. The inside draw helps and the rise in weight shows this is an easier race. Can get back to winning ways today. CRUISE TO RIO (4) won two back before closing strongly again last start in a BM58+ here last time out. Likely to get back from the draw once again, but her form is hard to knock and she loves this track and trip. Watch for her flying late. NICCY'S AFFAIR (8) couldn't bring up the hat-trick when a beaten favourite over this course and distance 10 days ago. Should roll forward from the draw once again and she rates highly on her recent form. Likely to be in the finish again. BRAVE APACHE (7) bolted in from the front last start. Drawn wide now but can repeat the dose without surprising. HENRY THE AVIATOR (3) is worth including on his recent form.
